mapper.insert: insert into paragraphs(chapter_id, paragraph_index, content, paragraph_hash, create_time) values (#{chapterId}, #{paragraphIndex}, #{content}, #{paragraphHash}, now())

insert into paragraphs(chapter_id, paragraph_index, content, paragraph_hash, create_time) values
(#{item.chapterId}, #{item.paragraphIndex}, #{item.content}, #{item.paragraphHash}, now())
